name: Juan Gaviria
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience building web applications, APIs, and microservices with JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, React, NestJs, and SQL databases. Delivered freelance solutions across 4 client projects and contributed to business-critical systems, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing. Known for problem solving, adaptability, collaboration, and clear communication in distributed teams.

experience.title: Junior Developer

Automated and optimized marketplace sales business logic, reducing manual effort and improving team efficiency
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and supported 3 testing layers: unit, integration, and end-to-end testing
